title: What's right numerical input format for salaries in the application form?
excerpt: I’m trying to fill out an application form and it doesn’t take the most common formatting for quantities and currency. (It’s the current salary field). It asks for both current salary and currency in the same field.

posts.author: pedrorosario (Pedro Rosario)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m trying to fill out an application form and it doesn’t take the most common formatting for quantities and currency. (It’s the current salary field). It asks for both current salary and currency in the same field.
